Off Calendar May-27-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ted Janowsky, Esq. of VOLUNTEER LEGAL SERVICES PROGRAM 575-3130, for defendant Gladys Denmark-Paul, demurring party
Michael S. Rossoff, Esq., 863-7100, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified --DEFENDANT DENMARK-PAUL, GLADYS' Petition For Relief Against Forfeiture Of Lease -- GRANTED
-- no opposition filed. Motion is granted on the conditions that defendant to pay past due rent of $2,596 and also $250 attorney's fees and $245.80 in costs to the plaintiff under a payment plan. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (PHA/301/JU) Reporter: Carl Sauceda, CSR #2031
